# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service-container
        image: my-service-image
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-authz
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: my-service-server
  rules:
  - clients:
      meshTLS:
        identities:
        - cluster.local/ns/linkerd/sa/some-service-account
  - clients:
      meshTLS:
        identities:
        - cluster.local/ns/linkerd/sa/another-service-account
